title: Online Safety & Security Partners - Google Safety Centre
content: Online Safety & Security Partners - Google Safety Centre <iframe src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-TKBHP5ZJ" height="0" width="0" style="display:none;visibility:hidden"></iframe> Jump to Content Safety Centre Google Account Safety Centre Learn how we're Safer by Design Privacy Privacy Practices Discover how we build products that protect your privacy. Ads & Data Learn about our advertising principles and your ad experience. Security Built-in Security Learn how built-in security keeps your personal information safe. Scams & Fraud Explore how we protect you from online scams and fraud. Security Tips Discover tools and tips to help keep you safe online. Authentication Learn about safer ways to sign in to your online accounts. Cybersecurity See how we lead cybersecurity in our approach and societal impact. AI AI & Safety Learn about how we are advancing AI safety with testing and standards. Secure AI Framework Learn about the core elements of our secure AI framework (SAIF). Content Content Safety Learn about our protections against harmful and illegal content. Learn more about Product Protections Android Android's ML-powered security guards against threats and protects privacy. Gmail Gmail blocks threats and keeps your messages encrypted. Nest Nest keeps your data private with built-in security and automatic updates. Assistant Assistant protects your privacy, and puts you in control of your data. Google Fi Wireless Google Fi Wireless protects your connection for calls, streaming, and browsing. Photos Photos keeps your memories safe with built-in security and privacy tools. Chrome Chrome guards against threats with safety checks and real-time detection. Google One Google One protects your expanded storage with industry-leading cloud security. Pixel Pixel keeps you safer both online and in the physical world. Family link Family Link helps parents set digital boundaries for their families. Google Pay Google Pay protects your payments and keeps your personal information safe. Search Google Search encrypts your searches, protects your data, and blocks threats. Fitbit Fitbit protects your wellness data and provides easy-to-use privacy settings. Maps Maps gives you privacy with Incognito mode and location history settings. YouTube YouTube protects your data with privacy tools and personalised viewing controls. Gemini Gemini blocks harmful content and provides easy access to your privacy settings. Meet Meet makes video calls safer with encryption and smart meeting management tools. Learn more about Safety Settings Ad Settings Learn about ad controls and how to customise your ad experiences. Security Settings Learn about security controls and how to add protection to your Google Account. Privacy Settings Learn about privacy controls and how to customise your data settings. Parental Controls Learn about parental controls and how to keep your family safer online. Google Account Overview Partners Our partners Google shares tools and knowledge about online safety with other companies, and works with individuals and website owners to help make the web safer and more secure for everyone. We also work with experts in online security and family safety to help provide advice and resources for you and your family.
